name: Paygent Connect
description: Paygent provides payment gateway and payment infrastructure services for online and in-person transactions; 'Paygent Connect' appears to be a merchant/integration offering for connecting to Paygent's platform (public developer docs not found).

auth_methods.note: The official Paygent site content on the English homepage is marketing/product oriented and does not provide public developer documentation or any described API authentication method (no mention of API keys, OAuth, tokens, signatures, etc.).

credential_access.note: The official partner page focuses on becoming a partner and contacting Paygent, but does not document any self-serve developer portal, signup flow, or how API credentials (if any) are obtained.

api_surface.note: The official products page describes Paygent offerings and features but does not link to or include public API documentation, endpoint references, SDKs, or a developer portal; any API surface (if it exists) is not publicly documented on this page.

buildability.note: Public developer documentation and self-serve API credential issuance are not available on the official site pages reviewed; integration likely requires contacting Paygent or becoming a partner.

queries: Paygent API ドキュメント
